name: borg
tagline: A deduplicating backup tool with compression and encrypted repositories
description: BorgBackup is a deduplicating backup program that supports compression and authentication, making backups fast and efficient. It's designed for individuals and sysadmins needing encrypted and space-efficient backups.

features.title: Deduplicating Backups
features.description: Stores backups efficiently by reusing identical data blocks

features.title: Encrypted Archives
features.description: Protects backup data using authenticated encryption

features.title: Incremental Snapshots
features.description: Creates point-in-time snapshots without full duplication

features.title: Compression Support
features.description: Reduces storage usage using configurable compression algorithms

features.title: Repository Integrity Checking
features.description: Verifies backup data consistency and detects corruption

features.title: Remote Backup Support
features.description: Stores backups on remote servers over SSH

features.title: Pruning Policies
features.description: Automatically removes old backups based on retention rules

features.title: File-Level Restore
features.description: Restores individual files or directories from archives

features.title: Cross-Platform Clients
features.description: Runs on Linux, macOS, and other Unix-like systems
